name: Lore Ingestion Pipeline
description: Scalable Apache Beam pipeline on Dataflow to ingest, chunk, embed, and load wiki lore pages into pgvector database.

parameters.name: pubsub_subscription
parameters.label: Pub/Sub Subscription Path
parameters.helpText: The Pub/Sub subscription to consume wiki ingestion tasks from (e.g. projects/animetix/subscriptions/lore-ingestion-sub).

parameters.name: database_url
parameters.label: Database URL
parameters.helpText: Connection URL for the PostgreSQL/AlloyDB database.

parameters.name: django_env
parameters.label: Django Environment
parameters.helpText: Set to 'production' to enable production configurations.
